emails.subject: Working from home
emails.body: Working from home I will be working from home for the rest of the day today. If you have any questions you can send them by email as I will be checking it from home. Thank you, Monika Causholli

emails.subject: RE: Working from home
emails.body: RE: Working from home Uh, were you able to get the price series for MTH? Thanks Dirk

emails.subject: RE: Working from home
emails.body: I did contact RISI and they will send it to me by email. Monika
